'''âw-t-zh''' ('''kawatazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:likee|likee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:likee|likee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-t-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kawatazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwatazh|thiwatazh]] || [[word:jiwatazh|jiwatazh]] || [[word:shiwatazh|shiwatazh]] || [[word:kiwatazh|kiwatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwatazh|thuthuwatazh]] || [[word:jujuwatazh|jujuwatazh]] || [[word:shushuwatazh|shushuwatazh]] || [[word:kukuwatazh|kukuwatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwatazh|thuwatazh]] || [[word:juwatazh|juwatazh]] || [[word:shuwatazh|shuwatazh]] || [[word:kuwatazh|kuwatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwatazh|thuwatazh]] || [[word:juwatazh|juwatazh]] || [[word:shuwatazh|shuwatazh]] || [[word:kuwatazh|kuwatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewatazh|thewatazh]] || [[word:jewatazh|jewatazh]] || [[word:shewatazh|shewatazh]] || [[word:kewatazh|kewatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowatazh|thothowatazh]] || [[word:jojowatazh|jojowatazh]] || [[word:shoshowatazh|shoshowatazh]] || [[word:kokowatazh|kokowatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowatazh|thowatazh]] || [[word:jowatazh|jowatazh]] || [[word:showatazh|showatazh]] || [[word:kowatazh|kowatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowatazh|thowatazh]] || [[word:jowatazh|jowatazh]] || [[word:showatazh|showatazh]] || [[word:kowatazh|kowatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwatazh|thĂŠwatazh]] || [[word:jĂŠwatazh|jĂŠwatazh]] || [[word:shĂŠwatazh|shĂŠwatazh]] || [[word:kĂŠwatazh|kĂŠwatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawatazh|thathawatazh]] || [[word:jajawatazh|jajawatazh]] || [[word:shashawatazh|shashawatazh]] || [[word:kakawatazh|kakawatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawatazh|thawatazh]] || [[word:jawatazh|jawatazh]] || [[word:shawatazh|shawatazh]] || [[word:kawatazh|kawatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawatazh|thawatazh]] || [[word:jawatazh|jawatazh]] || [[word:shawatazh|shawatazh]] || [[word:kawatazh|kawatazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawatazh|shawatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawatazh|goshawatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawatazh|gokishawatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawatazhnĂŒ|shawatazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawatazhnknĂŒ|goshawatazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawatazhnĂŒ|gokishawatazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawatazhshĂ«|shawatazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkshĂ«|goshawatazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawatazhshĂ«|gokishawatazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawatazhro|shawatazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkro|goshawatazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawatazhro|gokishawatazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawatazhmu|shawatazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkmu|goshawatazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawatazhmu|gokishawatazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawatazhsher|shawatazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawatazhnksher|goshawatazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawatazhsher|gokishawatazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawatazhng|shawatazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkng|goshawatazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawatazhng|gokishawatazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawatazhya|shawatazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkya|goshawatazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawatazhya|gokishawatazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawatazhyam|shawatazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkyam|goshawatazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawatazhyam|gokishawatazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawatazhnĂŒshĂ«|shawatazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawatazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawatazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawatazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawatazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawatazhnĂŒro|shawatazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawatazhnknĂŒro|goshawatazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawatazhnĂŒro|gokishawatazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawatazhnĂŒmu|shawatazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawatazhnknĂŒmu|goshawatazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawatazhnĂŒmu|gokishawatazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawatazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shawatazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawatazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawatazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawatazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawatazhshĂ«ro|shawatazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkshĂ«ro|goshawatazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawatazhshĂ«ro|gokishawatazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawatazhshĂ«mu|shawatazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkshĂ«mu|goshawatazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawatazhshĂ«mu|gokishawatazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawatazhronĂŒ|shawatazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkronĂŒ|goshawatazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawatazhronĂŒ|gokishawatazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawatazhroshĂ«|shawatazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkroshĂ«|goshawatazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawatazhroshĂ«|gokishawatazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawatazhromu|shawatazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkromu|goshawatazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawatazhromu|gokishawatazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawatazhmunĂŒ|shawatazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkmunĂŒ|goshawatazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawatazhmunĂŒ|gokishawatazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawatazhmushĂ«|shawatazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkmushĂ«|goshawatazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawatazhmushĂ«|gokishawatazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawatazhmuro|shawatazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawatazhnkmuro|goshawatazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawatazhmuro|gokishawatazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
